year. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_ACTV_IND 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_ACTV_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: The value of this variable = 1 (“Yes”) when PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_CD (variable in the APR enrollment 
file) equals “01”–“06.”
